Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alaska"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alabama"

Video.summary: In part 1 of the British episodes, Andy starts his road trip around the United Kingdom in the Cotswolds where he sets out to hunt and taste the beautiful venison that Michelin star chef, Mark Robinson has to offer. He then proceeds to travel to the border of Scotland where he samples some of the finest and most historic bird shooting practices found throughout the British Isles.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 1"

Video.summary: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 2"

Video.summary: The boys are at the dirty bird in Oklahoma kicking off the second day of bow season. Randy is already tagged out on a dandy of an 8 point we showed you last season in the “Camp Buck episode”. Joe Umphries from Big Tine is in camp and he is trying to close the deal on a buck he had a close call with last season at the Dirty Bird.
Video.title: "Bow Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: When temperatures plummet and the landscape is buried in snow, the whitetail deer’s true resilience is put to the test.
Video.title: "Surviving Winter"

Video.summary: New. York. City. That’s where our host Josh Rosen kicks off his journey in Episode 4—and where he lived for 16 years and started up the surf-centric apparel brand, Saturdays NYC. Back in his old stomping grounds, Josh first meets up with the award-winning chef and Mumbai native, Chintan Pandya, currently blowing up the New York food scene with his unapologetic and authentic Indian cuisine (pro tip: try the goat brains). Next, Josh travels through the boroughs, heads upstate, and along the coast to source local ingredients—from sake brewers and pig farmers to catching fresh lobster just 100 miles from Wall Street. As always the adventure will end with a feast, right back in Chintan’s kitchen.
Video.title: DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"

Image.alt: DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"
DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"
DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"

Video.summary: It’s D Season in Wisconsin. After a well-scouted plan falls apart, Josh Dahlke’s solo hunt leads him to a new permission property that he’s never set foot on. E-scouting pays off and a late morning gobbler commits to seductive calling paired with an Avian-X decoy.
Video.title: "Ten-To-Two Gobbler"

Video.summary: Bow season is finally here and the boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma. Randy is chasing a buck he named "The Camp Buck" because of how close the buck is to camp. If Randy can get it done this will be his biggest buck to date in Oklahoma.
Video.title: "The Camp Buck"

Video.summary: On this episode, we travel to Walker, Minnesota to highlight a great organization tucked back in the woods called Camp Bliss! Camp Bliss hosts a wide arrange of events throughout the year that are tailored for Veterans to find rest, relaxation and respite. We tag along on an Ice Fishing outing, a turkey hunt and a Women's Veterans retreat as we highlight this great organization and the heroes they serve. We also highlight Des Moine Iowa SCHEELS hometown hero, Navy Veteran Steve Booth!
Video.title: "Camp Bliss"

Video.summary: Follow retired veteran Kevin Keim as he embarks on a whitetail deer hunt of a lifetime, awarded through the annual Bucks for the Brave event—an initiative honoring America’s heroes.
Video.title: "Whitetails & Warriors"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor catch two thirds of a slam when they bring Tom’s new Yellowfin 24’ Bay up to Key Largo for some exciting flats fishing.
Video.title: "Two Out Of Three Ain't Bad"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger take Plantation Boat Mart’s new 36’ Invincible out to the swordfish grounds.
Video.title: "Swordfishing out of Plantation Boat Mart"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger break in their new Invincible Catamaran with a trip to fish out of Palm Beach with their friend Captain Dave Fields.
Video.title: "Palm Beach in the new Invincible Catamaran"

Image.alt: "Palm Beach in the new Invincible Catamaran"
"Palm Beach in the new Invincible Catamaran"
"Palm Beach in the new Invincible Catamaran"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger fly kites with Captain Dave Fields for a great day of sailfishing out of Sailfish Marina in Palm Beach.
Video.title: "Palm Beach Sailfishing"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger take a long run out into the Gulf from Key West to sample the bottom fishing and the long range capability of their new Invincible Catamaran.
Video.title: "Way Out in the Gulf Part 1"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger continue fishing after taking a long run out into the Gulf from Key West to sample the bottom fishing and the long range capability of their new Invincible Catamaran.
Video.title: "Way Out in the Gulf Part 2"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger fish out of Key West for tunas and sailfish while battling big seas and big sharks.
Video.title: "Chasing Pelagics in Big Seas Out of Key West"

Image.alt: "Chasing Pelagics in Big Seas Out of Key West"
"Chasing Pelagics in Big Seas Out of Key West"
"Chasing Pelagics in Big Seas Out of Key West"

Video.summary: The Amateur Division reaches its climax at the Super Retriever Series Crown Championship. Top teams battle through the final rounds of Retriever Trials, where every point matters. In the end, one standout handler and dog team rises above the rest to be crowned Amateur SRS Crown Champions. At the same time, the excitement continues on the dock as fun-loving canine athletes compete for their own Crown victories in SRS Super Dock.
Video.title: Series - "Crown Championship Part 2"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade and the crew head north to scout out, plan, and put in the plots to lay the groundwork for this falls hunting season in the Midwest!
Video.title: "Heading North, Missouri Food Plot Prep"

Video.summary: Rutting season is a key time for most hunters, but what does it mean when whitetails are rutting in December? In this episode of Deer & Deer Hunting, Dan Schmidt explores the phenomenon of the second rut, while Josh Honeycutt gets an up-close look at the action firsthand.
Video.title: "Rutting in December"

Video.summary: Knowing when to spot and stalk is crucial for any hunter. In this episode of DDH-TV, Mark Kayser breaks down three key factors for success, while Dan Schmidt puts them into action as he stalks a buck in Nebraska’s Sandhills.
Video.title: "Stalking the Sandhills"

Video.summary: In this episode of Flats Class, CA travels to Venice, Louisiana to chase monster redfish on the flats with local expert Capt. Eric Newman.
Video.title: "Jumbo-laya"

Video.summary: CA’s skiff gets an upgrade. Now no fish is safe.
Video.title: "No Water? No Problem"

Video.summary: With the drought ending and rain headed their way, the crew hunts the final days of the first split in Bayou Black with new friends Jesse Griffiths and Dirk Sorrells.
Video.title: "Bayou Black Belly Bands"

Video.summary: The second split is here, and the crew decides to try their luck at historic Old Hickory in Lacour, Louisiana. Ducks, deer, and mouth-watering meals are all on the menu.
Video.title: "Lacour Long Gravy"

Video.summary: The Super Retriever Series Crown Championship brings together the nation’s top canine athletes and handlers in Shreveport-Bossier City, Louisiana. In Part 1 of the Amateur Division, teams face off in challenging Retriever Trials alongside high-energy SRS Super Dock competition. Precision, power, and teamwork are put to the test as the road to the Crown begins.
Video.title: Series - "Crown Championship Part 1"

Video.summary: This episode is all about thanking our service men and women who have served or are still currently serving; Our pals Wes Thomas and Terry McWilliams join in to help thank these heroes, along with great companies like IN 811 and Centerpoint; special thanks to West Bogg Park for having us again this year.
Video.title: "Tribute to Heroes"

Video.summary: Mitch Widom, Andy Yaffa, & Chris Hammaway join Capt. Jared Raskob in Los Cabos on the hunt for Striped Marlin Part 2.
Video.title: "Cabo Marlin Part 2"

Video.summary: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma getting the Oklahoma turkey season kicked off.
Video.title: "Turkey Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: Randy is at the Raven in Missouri trying to take advantage of some dry weather and get some Big Tine borderline planted and check off a long list of other summer time prep work as opening day of deer season will be here before we know it.
Video.title: "Summer Time Work On The Raven"

Video.summary: Mike heads to Table Rock Lake to meet up with Trenton and his family. Even battling the tough fishing conditions following a heavy front, there’s never a lack of family time, laughs or friendly competitions with the Southards.
Video.title: “Family Rock”

Video.summary: Trenton is headed to meet up with Andrew Norbye on Lake Guntersville in Alabama. With not a lot of current being pulled, the deep schools weren’t set up to feed. So they went up shallow to fish grass until evening time when the ledge fish really started biting.
Video.title: "Doubled Up"

Video.summary: Rex meets up with “Mr Crappie” Wally Marshall in Texas. Wally takes Rex to one of his secret spots to put the hammer on the crappie. Not only did they catch crappie, but nice largemouth and some top tier coppernose bluegill.
Video.title: "Slab Daddy"

Video.summary: The Crew heads to Rivers Lodge and Hunt Club in Kansas to fish strip pits. Trenton and Rex take on Mike and Nate in a 3 period mini tournament. With multiple species allowed including northern pike, the two teams are neck and neck after the first two periods. Due to bad weather on day 2, period 3 turned into a hour speed round where only keeper largemouth count.
Video.title: "Rivers"

Video.summary: Will Cooper flies from sunny Texas to chilly Minnesota for his first out-of-state turkey hunt. After an ice-cold morning in the turkey woods, the temps begin to rise and the POSSE regroups to find a midday gobbler that’s willing to work.
Video.title: "Cold Blooded Gobbler"

Video.summary: It’s D Season in Wisconsin. After a well-scouted plan falls apart, Josh Dahlke’s solo hunt leads him to a new permission property that he’s never set foot on. E-scouting pays off and a late morning gobbler commits to seductive calling paired with an Avian-X decoy.
Video.title: "Ten-To-Two Gobbler"

Video.summary: Lachlan Weber experiences a full day of unstoppable turkey hunting action during opening day of Wisconsin’s youth season. After multiple close calls, a shot opportunity finally surfaces on the second day but things quickly go sideways. Quit or keep pressing? It’s a tough decision for the POSSE, but the turkey gods have spoken.
Video.title: "Redemption Gobbler"

Video.summary: In Episode 3, Josh starts off in the Twin Cities where he meets up with Yia Vang, an award-winning Hmong chef and restaurant owner, bringing his family’s traditions and flavors to the American Midwest. As Josh heads up north to Duluth and the boundary waters, he’ll meet plenty of farmers and foragers—harvesting mushrooms, wild rice, and catching a few fish (and waves) along the way. It all wraps up with an epic feast hosted by Yia back in the cities.
Video.title: DIRT - "Can You Surf & Eat Like a Local in Minnesota? Wild Foraging & Delicious Local Eats"

Image.alt: DIRT - "Can You Surf & Eat Like a Local in Minnesota? Wild Foraging & Delicious Local Eats"
DIRT - "Can You Surf & Eat Like a Local in Minnesota? Wild Foraging & Delicious Local Eats"
DIRT - "Can You Surf & Eat Like a Local in Minnesota? Wild Foraging & Delicious Local Eats"

Video.summary: Meet Ryan, a seasoned St. Petersburg guide, fighting tides, time, and the last great tarpon run of the season.
Video.title: "Ryan Harrington"

Video.summary: Capt. Jonathan Moss ventures to South Florida with the hope of having a few Exotic Encounters.
Video.title: "Exotic Encounters"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor let Rich's son, Captain Reed Tudor guide them on an epic day fishing all over Florida Bay in Everglades National Park.
Video.title: "Everglades Action with Captain Reed Tudor"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor fish with Hawks Cay's Captain Jeff Malone for resident tarpon close to home.
Video.title: "Tarpon Time with Captain Jeff Malone"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor fish Islamorada, FL on some structure close to shore for big Goliath Grouper.
Video.title: "Islamorada Goliaths"

Video.summary: Josh Dahlke makes the long-awaited journey to Hawaii as a critical piece to the Super Slam puzzle. Hawaii offers a turkey hunting adventure like none other, and there’s nobody resident companion than Jon Sabati – a Hawaii turkey hunting legend.
Video.title: "Volcano Gobbler"

Video.summary: After a long winter, Pete Osterman is eager to knock down his Minnesota gobbler with Josh Dahlke for their annual opening-week tradition. But like many turkey hunts, the POSSE gets the runaround at fly-down and end up grinding all day for an opportunity.
Video.title: "Dawn to Dusk Gobbler"

Video.summary: After a long winter, Pete Osterman is eager to knock down his Minnesota gobbler with Josh Dahlke for their annual opening-week tradition. But like many turkey hunts, the POSSE gets the runaround at fly-down and end up grinding all day for an opportunity.
Video.title: "Dawn to Dusk Gobbler"

Video.summary: Randy and Cody are back on the Raven in Missouri and with opening day of bow season fast approaching they are scrambling to get all the final prep work done and correct any mistakes they might have made along the way.
Video.title: "Brotherly Love"

Video.summary: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma trying to run some trot lines on the North Canadian river but the water is just a little lower than they expected.
Video.title: "Pirates Of The Canadian"

Video.summary: Rifle season is off to a slow start but things are heating up with lots of tags to fill.
Video.title: "It's Tradition"

Video.summary: With bow camp starting off strong at the Dirty Bird, Randy is feeling good about the rest of the week. Until Cody decides to head into town and places a small wager with a stranger.
Video.title: "Where's The TV"
